features.evidence: it doesn t matter how how hard i pushed this laptop now there s some advantages to this the longevity of this omen 16 is probably going to be a lot better than the zephyrus g16 but you do lose out in a little bit of performance when things get crazy on the omen 16 it just power throttles right away core clock speeds come right back down but after a while things start to even out with the g16 it s always even across the board at the expense of higher temperatures now the speakers nothing special they re on the bottom of the laptop they re a bit flat there s no high end the mids are completely drowned out but they get loud enough that you can hear them over the fans but if you re using this you probably want to keep headphones on the entire time but it does have a full hd webcam so you ll look your prettiest when you re on a zoom call or if you decide to use the laptop for streaming now getting inside is very easy on this laptop i the two big fans you have two thick copper heat pipes running across the middle a third one going along the side and then you have two slots to upgrade your ram this is ddr5 and it can be upgraded to 64 gigabytes unfortunately there s only one drive slot usually with 16 inch notebooks especially gaming laptops you get at least two but for some reason on this model there s only one i feel they could have put something over here you have a swappable wi fi 6e card and then you have a big 83 watt hour battery and it got really good battery life with this guy and i think that s one of the benefits of going with the weaker i7 compared to the hx processors that you ll find in different versions of this laptop so here s the thing when it comes to buying this omen 16 it s going to come down to the price because this is not the most premium feeling laptop on the market but i do the design i think it looks really clean it looks classy i love the fact that you get great battery life on a gaming laptop the rgb on this if that s your thing looks really really cool and for the most part the performance was fantastic with some of the best temps i ve seen on a gaming laptop in the last few months but this display is absolutely horrible they gotta stop sticking displays this on laptops especially laptops with i7 processors and rtx 4060s now the good news is there are other versions of this laptop with hx processors and better display options so you don t have to get this terrible display but if you re looking at this specific unit which i think might be specific to canada i d probably skip it just because the display alone i hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did feel free to hit the button if you re new to the channel subscribe and i ll see you guys on the next one However, it lost 17 of its battery charge while asleep for 24 hours

it s 16 by nine so it s your typical gamer display or what we re used to from previous laptops it s a matte display so you don t get as much reflection as you would with a glossy panel but my problem with this display at least on this model is that it s terrible it is an awful display if you re a designer it s an awful display if you re watching content on this because the srgb is only 65 and i think that s a really big bummer because a lot about this laptop is really good and this is probably my biggest complaint now you do have 144 hertz refresh rate the brightness is very average but you do have a very good looking keyboard deck the keys felt great to use when i was gaming i didn t have any rollover issues i could press a bunch of the keys at the same time and it will register whereas with some other gaming laptops it might not you have a little macro key area over here the only thing i don t is i really wish they placed the delete key over here and then put the power button over here because sometimes they ll be playing and then i ll go for the delete key which is usually by the numpad on other laptops and end up hitting the omen command center now this is a left handed problem because i bind my keys all over here but if you re not left handed then this really doesn t apply to you full size arrow keys you have four zones of rgb lighting and because this laptop is completely black it just looks really good when the light is on you have a fairly good size touch pad at the bottom unfortunately it is plastic but it s accurate enough and the sticker placement is awful the guy was literally playing pin the sticker on the donkey had his eyes blindfolded and it was just doing one of these just one of these now as you can see here as the review is going on it s starting to pick up a lot of fingerprints so keep that in mind this will get very very dirty but this skew right here is using an i7 1362h cpu paired with an rtx 4060 that runs up to 120 watts 60 gigabytes of ddr5 ram then you have a one terabyte nvme ssd i think this sku is specific to canada because i was looking at the us skus and all of them are hx processors so i don t know if this is coming to the states as well but this is obviously a more i don t know budget version compared to some of the other omen 16s that they re currently offering now i did compare this to the g16 because it s very similar in terms of specifications so it gives you an idea of what to expect if you re looking at either laptop and when it comes to single core and multi core performance they both perform very very well it s not until you start using specific applications do you see that the hp omen 16 does perform better my guess is you have a thicker chassis there s a lot more room to breathe so it can keep things cooler for longer it doesn t matter if you re using adobe photoshop premiere pro if you re talking about blender or any other application the omen 16 tends to beat out the g16 i did lower the resolution on the g16 from 1920 by 1200 to 1920 by 1080 to make everything fair at least when it came to gaming and most of the games on the omen 16 did perform better than the g16 the only game that the g16 continuously beat out the omen was that when it came to f1 2022 so i don t know if i had something wrong in my settings i went over it a few times but i kept beating it out for some weird reason but when it came to every other game the omen 16 was obviously faster now heat management is very interesting comparing it to the g16 because the g16 obviously runs hotter cpu temps are always up at 88 89 degrees celsius which is not a big deal it s fine if it s under 90 degrees but the omen 16 is a lot more conservative cpu attempts never passed 80 However, it s a 20 upgrade to get 6e when you customize the laptop with the link below the video, which i think is worth it considering how annoying it ll be to change later

2 pounds and you have a good amount of i o but there s other gaming laptops out there that have a bit more for example you have an rj45 port this goes up to 1000 megabits per second you have a usb a port and then on the right hand side you have your barrel connector which connects a 230 watt power brick this is a chunky guy and then you have two more usb a ports hdmi port and then you have a usb type c port this type c port is not thunderbolt 4 even though there s a 13th gen intel processor inside of here opening up is very easy you can do it with one hand the screen is a little bit wobbly but not nearly as wobbly as previous hp omen 15 so they ve tightened up the hinge of it you can obviously put the display all the way back flat to the table if you really want to and what you have here is a big 16 inch display now this display is not 16 by 10 However, backlight bleed wasn t bad, not enough to notice when viewing darker content, but this will vary between panels

2 pounds and you have a good amount of i o but there s other gaming laptops out there that have a bit more for example you have an rj45 port this goes up to 1000 megabits per second you have a usb a port and then on the right hand side you have your barrel connector which connects a 230 watt power brick this is a chunky guy and then you have two more usb a ports hdmi port and then you have a usb type c port this type c port is not thunderbolt 4 even though there s a 13th gen intel processor inside of here opening up is very easy you can do it with one hand the screen is a little bit wobbly but not nearly as wobbly as previous hp omen 15 so they ve tightened up the hinge of it you can obviously put the display all the way back flat to the table if you really want to and what you have here is a big 16 inch display now this display is not 16 by 10 However, in terms of performance, the intel i7 14th gen hx processor 8gb rtx 4060 graphic card is a killer combination

so today we re taking a look at the 2023 hp omen 16 and the last one i reviewed i think was the 15 inch model and the vibes are still the same you have this black laptop the back sticks out a little bit there s no ports unfortunately to keep the cables clean but i dig this look it s simple it s clean it s effective even when you touch the top of the lid yes it s very very flexible in the middle i don t that but it has this matte vibe to it which looks a bit different than your standard aluminum chassis black laptop and i think that s the thing this is a plastic laptop so it gives you that matte look it doesn t feel as premium as a razer blade 15 for example but the price point of this is obviously much lower it s a chunkier laptop it s pretty thick it weighs about 5 However, so far, the record low price we ve featured the omen 16 with 5060 graphics for on the deal site was 926
it also has a fhd webcam that supports 30fps videos and the quality is quite decent However, but you can customize it quite a bit with lower or higher specs when ordering with the link below

it doesn t matter how how hard i pushed this laptop now there s some advantages to this the longevity of this omen 16 is probably going to be a lot better than the zephyrus g16 but you do lose out in a little bit of performance when things get crazy on the omen 16 it just power throttles right away core clock speeds come right back down but after a while things start to even out with the g16 it s always even across the board at the expense of higher temperatures now the speakers nothing special they re on the bottom of the laptop they re a bit flat there s no high end the mids are completely drowned out but they get loud enough that you can hear them over the fans but if you re using this you probably want to keep headphones on the entire time but it does have a full hd webcam so you ll look your prettiest when you re on a zoom call or if you decide to use the laptop for streaming now getting inside is very easy on this laptop i the two big fans you have two thick copper heat pipes running across the middle a third one going along the side and then you have two slots to upgrade your ram this is ddr5 and it can be upgraded to 64 gigabytes unfortunately there s only one drive slot usually with 16 inch notebooks especially gaming laptops you get at least two but for some reason on this model there s only one i feel they could have put something over here you have a swappable wi fi 6e card and then you have a big 83 watt hour battery and it got really good battery life with this guy and i think that s one of the benefits of going with the weaker i7 compared to the hx processors that you ll find in different versions of this laptop so here s the thing when it comes to buying this omen 16 it s going to come down to the price because this is not the most premium feeling laptop on the market but i do the design i think it looks really clean it looks classy i love the fact that you get great battery life on a gaming laptop the rgb on this if that s your thing looks really really cool and for the most part the performance was fantastic with some of the best temps i ve seen on a gaming laptop in the last few months but this display is absolutely horrible they gotta stop sticking displays this on laptops especially laptops with i7 processors and rtx 4060s now the good news is there are other versions of this laptop with hx processors and better display options so you don t have to get this terrible display but if you re looking at this specific unit which i think might be specific to canada i d probably skip it just because the display alone i hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did feel free to hit the button if you re new to the channel subscribe and i ll see you guys on the next one

it s 16 by nine so it s your typical gamer display or what we re used to from previous laptops it s a matte display so you don t get as much reflection as you would with a glossy panel but my problem with this display at least on this model is that it s terrible it is an awful display if you re a designer it s an awful display if you re watching content on this because the srgb is only 65 and i think that s a really big bummer because a lot about this laptop is really good and this is probably my biggest complaint now you do have 144 hertz refresh rate the brightness is very average but you do have a very good looking keyboard deck the keys felt great to use when i was gaming i didn t have any rollover issues i could press a bunch of the keys at the same time and it will register whereas with some other gaming laptops it might not you have a little macro key area over here the only thing i don t is i really wish they placed the delete key over here and then put the power button over here because sometimes they ll be playing and then i ll go for the delete key which is usually by the numpad on other laptops and end up hitting the omen command center now this is a left handed problem because i bind my keys all over here but if you re not left handed then this really doesn t apply to you full size arrow keys you have four zones of rgb lighting and because this laptop is completely black it just looks really good when the light is on you have a fairly good size touch pad at the bottom unfortunately it is plastic but it s accurate enough and the sticker placement is awful the guy was literally playing pin the sticker on the donkey had his eyes blindfolded and it was just doing one of these just one of these now as you can see here as the review is going on it s starting to pick up a lot of fingerprints so keep that in mind this will get very very dirty but this skew right here is using an i7 1362h cpu paired with an rtx 4060 that runs up to 120 watts 60 gigabytes of ddr5 ram then you have a one terabyte nvme ssd i think this sku is specific to canada because i was looking at the us skus and all of them are hx processors so i don t know if this is coming to the states as well but this is obviously a more i don t know budget version compared to some of the other omen 16s that they re currently offering now i did compare this to the g16 because it s very similar in terms of specifications so it gives you an idea of what to expect if you re looking at either laptop and when it comes to single core and multi core performance they both perform very very well it s not until you start using specific applications do you see that the hp omen 16 does perform better my guess is you have a thicker chassis there s a lot more room to breathe so it can keep things cooler for longer it doesn t matter if you re using adobe photoshop premiere pro if you re talking about blender or any other application the omen 16 tends to beat out the g16 i did lower the resolution on the g16 from 1920 by 1200 to 1920 by 1080 to make everything fair at least when it came to gaming and most of the games on the omen 16 did perform better than the g16 the only game that the g16 continuously beat out the omen was that when it came to f1 2022 so i don t know if i had something wrong in my settings i went over it a few times but i kept beating it out for some weird reason but when it came to every other game the omen 16 was obviously faster now heat management is very interesting comparing it to the g16 because the g16 obviously runs hotter cpu temps are always up at 88 89 degrees celsius which is not a big deal it s fine if it s under 90 degrees but the omen 16 is a lot more conservative cpu attempts never passed 80 However, the only other downsides from the slightly weaker cpu are that it only has 16 gb of ram and 512 gb of storage

review_summary: it doesn t matter how how hard i pushed this laptop now there s some advantages to this the longevity of this omen 16 is probably going to be a lot better than the zephyrus g16 but you do lose out in a little bit of performance when things get crazy on the omen 16 it just power throttles right away core clock speeds come right back down but after a while things start to even out with the g16 it s always even across the board at the expense of higher temperatures now the speakers nothing special they re on the bottom of the laptop they re a bit flat there s no high end the mids are completely drowned out but they get loud enough that you can hear them over the fans but if you re using this you probably want to keep headphones on the entire time but it does have a full hd webcam so you ll look your prettiest when you re on a zoom call or if you decide to use the laptop for streaming now getting inside is very easy on this laptop i the two big fans you have two thick copper heat pipes running across the middle a third one going along the side and then you have two slots to upgrade your ram this is ddr5 and it can be upgraded to 64 gigabytes unfortunately there s only one drive slot usually with 16 inch notebooks especially gaming laptops you get at least two but for some reason on this model there s only one i feel they could have put something over here you have a swappable wi fi 6e card and then you have a big 83 watt hour battery and it got really good battery life with this guy and i think that s one of the benefits of going with the weaker i7 compared to the hx processors that you ll find in different versions of this laptop so here s the thing when it comes to buying this omen 16 it s going to come down to the price because this is not the most premium feeling laptop on the market but i do the design i think it looks really clean it looks classy i love the fact that you get great battery life on a gaming laptop the rgb on this if that s your thing looks really really cool and for the most part the performance was fantastic with some of the best temps i ve seen on a gaming laptop in the last few months but this display is absolutely horrible they gotta stop sticking displays this on laptops especially laptops with i7 processors and rtx 4060s now the good news is there are other versions of this laptop with hx processors and better display options so you don t have to get this terrible display but if you re looking at this specific unit which i think might be specific to canada i d probably skip it just because the display alone i hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did feel free to hit the button if you re new to the channel subscribe and i ll see you guys on the next one However, it lost 17 of
